jobText:
tarte cosmetics is seeking enthusiastic rising seniors for an in-person Summer 2026 Marketing Internship in New York City.

Responsibilities:
Support day-to-day responsibilities in applicable marketing departments
Ownership of assigned daily/weekly tasks
Collaborate with cross-functional teams on brand initiatives and events
Attend trainings and speaking engagements led by tarte leaders across various departments
Work closely with interns in various departments to complete an independent Capstone Project
Develop your teamwork, leadership, analytical, and strategic thinking skills

Requirements:
Must be a current student of an accredited college, rising seniors preferred
Ability to be in-person based in NYC office during the summer
Ability to multitask and remain flexible in a fast-paced environment
Strong teamwork skills
Strong organization and communication skills
Excellent written and interpersonal skills
Comfortable using AI tools and platforms
